name: Roasted Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Halve the potatoes and cut into 1-inch wedges.
2. Heat 1/3 cup olive oil in a roasting pan at 425°F (220°C).
3. Add the potatoes to the pan and toss to coat well.
4. Roast for 10 minutes, turn the potatoes, then roast for another 10 minutes until tender.
5. Remove the pan from the oven and let the potatoes cool in the pan.
6. In a food processor or blender, combine garlic, vinegar, rosemary, and salt. Process to a fine puree.
7. With the machine running, add the remaining oil in a thin, steady stream and process until thickened.
8. Soak sliced onions in water for 5 minutes, drain well, and pat dry with paper towels.
9. Blanch green beans in boiling water for 5 minutes, then drain, refresh in cold water, and drain well.
10. Combine the potatoes, onions, and olives in a large bowl. Toss gently to mix well with the dressing.
11. Garnish with rosemary sprigs.
12. Serve chilled or at room temperature.
